Course Title: IoT + AI: Expanding the Attack Surface
Category: Technology & Telecommunications: Information Technology, Science & Technology, Software, Hardware, Telecom
Who is this for: IT managers, network administrators, system administrators, operations managers, facility managers, security coordinators, technology managers, IoT device managers
Team or Dept this is for: IT, Operations, Facilities Management, Security, Technology
Description: Connected devices using AI in uncontrolled environments.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with how the internet works and a general curiosity about connected devices and security concepts is all you need to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key security vulnerabilities introduced by AI-enabled IoT devices and explain how connected technologies expand the attack surface in real-world environments. You will also apply foundational risk assessment techniques to recognise and prioritise threats posed by AI-driven devices operating in uncontrolled or public-facing settings.
